MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-07-2019 - APPEARANCES AT TRIAL CALL BY KELSEY HANDCOCK, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT WILLIAM BITNER, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT SENT PARTIES TO A JUDGE PRO TEM FOR A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THE SETTLEMENT OFFICER DIRECTED PARTIES TO RETURN TO DEPT. 206 REGARDING A CONTINUANCE REQUEST OF THE TRIAL DATE. PARTIES AGREED & ORALLY REQUESTED TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT GRANTED THE CONTINUANCE REQUEST TO APR-08-2019 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AFFIDAVIT OR DECLARATION PROVIDING THE COURT FOR THE BASIS FOR THE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT OF THE TRIAL CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR APR-08-2019 VACATED. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED 1/11/19. (206)
